resources.string:
PRIVACY POLICY — SwiftDoc

Effective Date: January 1, 2025

SwiftDoc ("we", "our", or "the app") is committed to protecting your privacy.

1. INFORMATION WE COLLECT
SwiftDoc does not collect or transmit any personal data. All PDF files and preferences are stored locally on your device.

2. STORAGE ACCESS
We request storage permission solely to open, save and manage PDF files on your device.

3. CAMERA ACCESS
Camera permission is used only for the document scanning feature. Photos are processed on-device and never uploaded.

4. ADVERTISING
SwiftDoc may display advertisements powered by Google AdMob. AdMob may collect device information for personalized ads.

5. DATA SECURITY
All your data remains on your device. We do not have access to your files.

6. CHILDREN'S PRIVACY
SwiftDoc is not intended for children under 13.

7. CONTACT
If you have questions: support@swiftdoc.app

By tapping "Allow", you agree to this Privacy Policy.

Scroll to the bottom to enable the buttons.
↓ Scroll to read the full policy
No PDF files found.\nTap + to open a PDF.
SwiftDoc needs storage permission to find PDF files.
Storage permission denied.\nTap + to open a PDF manually.
